blocker.summary: Real OBS/microphone pass is blocked in Chrome/Jitsi, not passed.
details: In-app browser reaches KISS PM Jitsi handoff but reports camera access denied; Browser.grantPermissions is unsupported through raw CDP.
Chrome reaches meet.jit.si lobby but devices remain stuck/denied: microphone/camera controls are disabled or no-access in settings; Browser.grantPermissions is unsupported through raw CDP.
Joining without audio reaches Jitsi waiting room, but public meet.jit.si requires a moderator/login before the conference starts.
blocker.requiredNext: User must manually allow camera/microphone for meet.jit.si in Chrome and/or provide a moderated/self-hosted Jitsi/LiveKit room where OBS Virtual Camera and microphone can be selected and joined.
